steps.title: Identify the key disadvantage to explain
steps.content: The notes reveal that audio-feature algorithms “may fail to accurately identify main audio features of a song with varying acoustic traits,” while algorithms based on fixed traits (like genre) are more reliable. This failure is the disadvantage that needs explaining.

steps.title: Match the answer that explains this failure
steps.content: B states that audio-feature algorithms may misidentify main features in songs with varying acoustic traits, making them less reliable than fixed-trait algorithms. A merely lists what algorithms use; C contrasts trait types but doesn't call audio features unreliable; D explains why tags work instead of why audio features fail. That matches choice B — B is correct.
